issues.title: Cross-feature import: products imports from cart
issues.description: The 'products' feature directly imports 'useAddToCart' from '@/features/cart'. This violates feature isolation — features must not import directly from other features. The same pattern appears in MobileBarWithCart.tsx and HeroSection.tsx.
issues.fix: Move the useAddToCart hook call up to a shared orchestration layer (e.g., the page or a shared application hook), or pass an onAddToCart callback as a prop from the parent that orchestrates both features.

issues.title: Cross-feature import: products imports from cart
issues.description: Duplicate of ARCH-001 pattern. 'products' feature imports 'useAddToCart' from '@/features/cart' in the product detail mobile bar component.
issues.fix: Inject the add-to-cart behavior as a prop callback from the parent page, which can import from both features.

issues.title: Cross-feature import: products imports from cart
issues.description: Duplicate of ARCH-001 pattern. 'products' feature imports 'useAddToCart' from '@/features/cart' in the product detail hero section.
issues.fix: Inject the add-to-cart behavior as a prop callback from the parent page.

issues.title: Cross-feature import: cart imports Product type from products
issues.description: The 'cart' feature imports 'Product' type from '@/features/products/domain/types'. This creates a bidirectional dependency between cart and products features. The Product type used as CartItem's base should ideally live in a shared domain layer (e.g. @/shared/domain/types) since both features need it.
issues.fix: Move the shared 'Product' type to '@/shared/domain/types' so both cart and products features can reference it without coupling to each other.

issues.title: Cross-feature import: seller-admins imports from products
issues.description: The 'seller-admins' feature directly imports 'useProductById' from '@/features/products/application/hooks/useProductForm'. Features should not import from each other.
issues.fix: Pass the product data as a prop to ProductDelegatesPage from the parent page/route that can fetch it, or expose a shared hook in '@/shared/application/hooks'.

issues.title: Cross-feature imports: products imports from orders and seller-admins
issues.description: The 'products' feature imports 'usePendingOrderCount' from '@/features/orders' and 'useDelegateCountsByProduct' from '@/features/seller-admins'. Both are cross-feature imports that violate feature isolation. ProductListPage is orchestrating multiple features but lives inside the products feature.
issues.fix: Move the orchestration to the App Router page (apps/studio/src/app/.../page.tsx) or create an app-level shared orchestration hook. Alternatively, pass the counts as props from a parent that owns all three features.

issues.title: Duplicated permission constant not extracted to domain/constants.ts
issues.description: The constant 'SELLER_ADMINS_READ_PERMISSION = "seller_admins.read"' is defined identically in both DelegateManagementPage.tsx (line 19) and ProductDelegatesPage.tsx (line 20). Magic permission strings should live in 'domain/constants.ts', not in presentation layer files.
issues.fix: Move 'SELLER_ADMINS_READ_PERMISSION' to 'apps/studio/src/features/seller-admins/domain/constants.ts' and import it in both pages.

issues.title: Magic number constant DEBOUNCE_MS defined in presentation layer
issues.description: The constant 'DEBOUNCE_MS = 300' is defined inline in the presentation component file. Debounce timing is a domain-level or application-level constant, not a presentation detail. Compare: admin/users feature correctly uses 'USER_SEARCH_DEBOUNCE_MS' from domain/constants.ts.
issues.fix: Move 'DEBOUNCE_MS' (or rename to 'PRODUCT_SEARCH_DEBOUNCE_MS') to 'apps/store/src/features/products/domain/constants.ts' and import it in ProductFilters.tsx.
